testCases.title: Registration — Personal Account Form Fields Present
testCases.notes: All sign-up fields present: Personal/Company radio (data-test-id: sign-up-personal-registration-radio-button / sign-up-organization-registration-radio-button), firstName, lastName, email, password, confirm password. All have proper data-test-id attributes.

testCases.title: Registration — Create Personal Account
testCases.notes: Verified via SMK-002 in prior run: smoke-smk002-1777882336279@test-agent.com registered successfully, redirected to /successful-registration.

testCases.title: Registration — Company Account Form Present
testCases.notes: Company radio (sign-up-organization-registration-radio-button) visible on /sign-up. Clicking Company radio reveals organizationName field (data-test-id: sign-up-organization-name-input, placeholder: Enter your company name). Field appears dynamically after radio selection.

testCases.title: Registration — Create Organization Account
testCases.notes: Org registration completed with org name 'AGENT-TEST-Org-Auth-Test-2026', redirected to /successful-registration (QA & Registration completed). Org name field accepted AGENT-TEST-* naming convention.

testCases.title: Registration — Password Visibility Toggle
testCases.notes: Password show/hide toggle button present on sign-in and sign-up pages. Password field toggles between type=password and type=text when toggle button clicked. Confirmed via sign-in page (Show/hide password button ref).

testCases.title: Registration — Empty Form Validation
testCases.notes: Empty sign-up form submission shows 'This field is required' for all required fields. Page stays on /sign-up. All 5 required fields (firstName, lastName, email, password, confirmPassword) show validation errors.

testCases.title: Registration — Max Characters Validation (64 char limit)
testCases.notes: All registration fields have maxlength=64 attribute: firstName, lastName, email, organizationName, password, confirmPassword. Attribute verified via DOM inspection. Input elements respect the maxlength constraint via HTML5 validation.

testCases.title: Registration — Org Required Fields (Company name required)
testCases.notes: Submitting org registration with empty Company name shows 'This field is required' error in company name field container. Registration stays on /sign-up. All org fields properly required.

testCases.title: Registration — Duplicate Email Rejection
testCases.notes: Attempting to register with already-registered email (smoke-smk002-1777882336279@test-agent.com) shows 'This email is already registered with us' error.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Email Format Validation
testCases.notes: Entering 'notanemail' (no @) and clicking Sign in shows field-level validation: 'Enter a valid email address, e.g. johndoe@gmail.com'. Email input is type=text but has frontend validation for format. Page stays on /sign-in.

testCases.title: Registration — Password Mismatch Validation
testCases.notes: Submitting registration with mismatched password fields shows 'The password fields must have matching values'. Password strength hints also shown: Digits/Lowercase/Uppercase/Special symbols required.

testCases.title: Registration — Password Policy Enforcement
testCases.notes: Password policy tips shown on /sign-up: 'Digits are required', 'Lowercase symbols are required', 'Special symbols are required', 'Uppercase symbols are required'. Server enforces policy on submit — weak password is rejected.

testCases.title: Registration — Email Verification Flow (Admin send)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Requires Admin > Security > Users > Resend verification email, then extract link from Admin > Notifications list. Cannot automate this flow in browser-only mode without admin access in current test context. Per project memory: QA email verification must go via admin panel.

testCases.title: Registration — Email Verification Link Validates Account
testCases.notes: Same blocker as AUTH-013 — requires email verification link from admin notifications.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Valid Credentials
testCases.notes: Sign-in with test-carlos.rodriguez-20260310@test-agent.com / TestPass123! succeeds. Redirected to / (homepage). Account button shows 'Carlos Rodriguez'. No error alert.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Invalid Credentials Error Message
testCases.notes: Sign-in with wrong password (WrongPassword999!) shows data-test-id='sign-in-error-alert' with text 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials'. Page stays on /sign-in. URL unchanged.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Empty Form Handling
testCases.notes: Submitting sign-in with cleared email/password fields shows 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials' (sign-in-error-alert). Page stays on /sign-in. No redirect or crash.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Session Created After Login
testCases.notes: After sign-in: account button shows user name 'Carlos Rodriguez', localStorage contains auth token with access_token, token_type='Bearer'. Session established correctly.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Logged-in User Redirected Away from /sign-in
testCases.notes: Navigating to /sign-in while authenticated redirects to /catalog (or homepage). Authenticated users cannot access sign-in page.

testCases.title: Sign-In — Session Persistence Across Navigation
testCases.notes: Confirmed via SMK-005: session persists across homepage → catalog → orders → dashboard navigation. Account button remains visible and user stays signed in.

testCases.title: SSO — Entra ID Sign-In Button Present
testCases.notes: Button 'Sign in with Entra ID' present on /sign-in page. data-test-id not set but button found via text content. SSO option available to users.

testCases.title: SSO — Google Sign-In Button Present
testCases.notes: Button 'Sign in with Google' present on /sign-in page. SSO option available to users. Two SSO providers confirmed: Entra ID and Google.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf — Operator Impersonates Customer
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Login on Behalf feature requires operator-level account (not available in agent pool user carlos.rodriguez / B2B org user). Feature not visible in standard org user account menu. Requires separate operator user credentials.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf — Impersonation Scope Limited to Own Org
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Same constraint as AUTH-027 — operator account required for login-on-behalf testing.

testCases.title: Password Reset — Forgot Password UI Flow
testCases.notes: Forgot password link on /sign-in navigates to /forgot-password (title: QA & Forgot password). Form shows email input (type=email) and Submit button. Submitting valid email shows 'We sent you a reset password link to your inbox'. URL stays on /forgot-password.

testCases.title: Password Reset — Non-Existent Email Shows Same Message
testCases.notes: Submitting nonexistent email (nonexistent-user-12345@test-notreal.com) to forgot password shows SAME confirmation message 'We sent you a reset password link to your inbox'. No user enumeration — security best practice confirmed.

testCases.title: Email Case Sensitivity — Login with Uppercase Email
testCases.notes: Sign-in with ALL-UPPERCASE email 'TEST-CARLOS.RODRIGUEZ-20260310@TEST-AGENT.COM' succeeded. Redirected to / (homepage), account button shows 'Carlos Rodriguez'. Email authentication is case-insensitive.

testCases.title: Password — Leading/Trailing Spaces Not Trimmed
testCases.notes: Sign-in with ' TestPass123! ' (leading+trailing spaces) shows 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials'. Password spaces are NOT trimmed — correct security behavior. Password with spaces is treated as wrong password.

testCases.title: Registration — Special Characters in Name Fields Accepted
testCases.notes: Registration with firstName="O'Brien" (apostrophe) and lastName='Müller' (umlaut) succeeded — redirected to /successful-registration. Special Unicode chars (letters, apostrophes) accepted by NameValidationPattern.

testCases.title: Sign-Out — Token Cleared from localStorage
testCases.notes: After clicking sign-out-button: account button disappears, sign-in link appears, localStorage auth token cleared (access_token removed). Token revocation confirmed client-side. (Also covered in SEC-AUTH-002.)

testCases.title: Registration — HTML Tags Rejected in Name Fields
testCases.notes: Registering with firstName='BoldName' and lastName='Test' shows field-level errors: "'First Name' contains invalid characters." and "'Last Name' contains invalid characters.". NameValidationPattern enforced. Registration stays on /sign-up. No XSS.

testCases.title: Account Lockout (AUTH-019 lockout variant)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: AUTH lockout test requires LOCKOUT_TEST_EMAIL environment variable (dedicated lockout test user). Cannot run brute force test against shared agent pool accounts. Same blocker as SEC-AUTH-003.

testCases.title: Password Reset — Link Validation / Password Update
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Requires accessing email inbox or admin notification panel to retrieve reset link. Cannot complete full reset flow in browser-only test context.

testCases.title: Registration — Terms and Conditions Checkbox
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Terms/conditions checkbox not present in current /sign-up form (registration form in this store does not require checkbox acceptance). Registration completes without checkbox.
